chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ بَدَأَ بِالسَّعْيِ قَبْلَ الطَّوَافِ أَوْ طَافَ وَ أَخَّرَ السَّعْيَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 135 – One who begins with the Sa’ee before the Tawaaf, or performs Tawaaf and delays the Sa’ee

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/46)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/46)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَقَالَ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ ثُمَّ يَعُودُ إِلَى الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ فَيَطُوفُ بَيْنَهُمَا.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan in Yahya, from Mansour Bin Hazim who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about a man who performs Tawaaf between Al Safa and Al Marwa before he performs Tawaaf by the House (Kaaba). So heasws said: ‘He should perform Tawaaf by the House (Kaaba). The he should return to Al-Safa and Al-Marwa, so he would perform Tawaaf between the two’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mansur ibn Hazim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who performs Tawaf (Sa‘y) between al- Safa’ and al-Marwah before Tawaf around the House. He (the Imam) said, ‘He must go back to perform Tawaf around the House, then return to perform Sa‘y between al-Safa’ and al-Marwah.’”
